metadata.title: Table of Contents
metadata.description: Create a table of contents for a note.

regex.source: name:"Create table of contents for next heading level"
regex.target: name:"为下一级标题创建目录"
.setName("兼容 Github 的 Markdown 章节链接")

regex.source: .setDesc("The type of list to render the table of contents as.")
.setDesc("Optional title to put before the table of contents")
regex.target: .setDesc("可选的标题，放在目录之前显示。")

regex.source: .setDesc("The lowest header depth to add to the table of contents. Defaults to 2")
regex.target: .setDesc("将最低标题层级添加到目录中。默认为 2")

regex.source: .setDesc("The highest header depth to add to the table of contents. Defaults to 6")
regex.target: .setDesc("将最高标题层级添加到目录中。默认为 6")

regex.source: .setDesc("Auto-generate Markdown links, instead of the default WikiLinks")
regex.target: .setDesc("自动生成 Markdown 链接，而非默认的 WikiLinks。")

regex.source: .appendText("Github generates section links differently than Obsidian, this setting uses ")
regex.target: .appendText("Github 生成章节链接的方式与 Obsidian 不同，此设置使用")

regex.source: throw new Error("Need module name to generate proper anchor for "+F);
regex.target: throw new Error("需要模块名称来为"+F+"生成正确的锚点");

regex.source: No headings below cursor matched settings
regex.target: 未找到光标下方符合设置要求的标题
(最低标题层级: ${F.minimumDepth}) (最高标题层级: ${F.maximumDepth})
